text:
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 31DEC2015 

COMMENT: The APL base file contains a continuous managed care contract date range that is constructed from 
one or more contract effective/end dates, if necessary. 

This variable is derived from the monthly managed care plan TAF contract start and end date pairs and 
identifies the earliest contract start date range continuous with the date range on the record with the 
last-best
